description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, lightly browned bun. The sausage is topped with a generous zigzag of bright red ketchup and a slightly less prominent yellow mustard, both applied in alternating stripes along the length of the sausage. The bun appears fluffy and slightly glossy, with a subtle gradient of golden brown on its exterior. The sausage is smooth and cylindrical, with a natural sheen that suggests a juicy texture. The condiments are thick and glossy, sitting atop the sausage without dripping over the sides. No packaging or additional toppings are visible, and the hot dog is presented as ready to eat.
description: A plump sausage in a golden bun, topped with zigzag stripes of ketchup and mustard. The hot dog looks fresh, glossy, and ready to eat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bun and the zigzag pattern of ketchup and mustard on top.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the exposed sausage and the alternating stripes of ketchup and mustard.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the bun and condiments visible but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view from the opposite end, again showing the sausage and condiments clearly.
